title: Pop Out Time Tracking Widget / Window
excerpt:

posts.author: djamieson (drew jamieson)
posts.cookedHtml:
When beginning to track time on an item, it would be great to have the option for a widget or pop out window for each item being tracked.

When multiple items are being time tracked at once, it is far too easy for employees to forget to update all of their items accurately.

All items currently time tracking need the option to be front and center on screen.
